headline: Snack protocol activated.
subhead: Hydration is a rumor; snacks are policy.
bulletins: If your brain is buffering, deploy chips immediately.
New law: cold fries qualify as a salad after 9 PM.
Reminder: coffee counts as a meeting participant, not a breakfast.
Denied: 'just air' (not a snack; that's a threat).

feature.name: Policy of the Day
feature.description: A new policy clause has been issued and immediately ignored with confidence.
